title: Colonies Modpack
description: Fun MineColonies modpack to enhance your citybuilding addiction for MC1.21.1
body:
A fun modpack put together to enchance the MineColonies expirience

Mods are added mainly for QoL and to make things look and play better

There are also performance enhancing mods to make sure your PC wont struggle

**Key mods:**
- **Minecolonies**
- Terralith
- Toms Storage
- Xaeros Map and Minimap
- Iris Shaders (with Complementary Shaders)
- VeinMiner
- Travelers Backpack
- Easy Villagers
- Waystones

**UI/QoL mods:**
- Mouse Tweaks
- Right Click Harvest
- Just Enough Items
- Longer Days
- Copper Gear
- Freecam
- Jade
- Zoom

FTB Ultimine would be a better pick for a Veinminer mod but Modrinth is not allowed to use it
You can download and add it yourself for an even better expirience!
